content.en:
"A god?"

The Qinghan Fairy was very puzzled, and invited a god-level, even if this god-level was strong, comparable to Daozi, what did it have to do with her entering the Stygian Flower Realm?

"Could it be that my father thinks that god-level can protect me?"

Qinghan Fairy guessed.

But if you think about it carefully, there are true god-level creatures in the Stygian Flower Realm, and ordinary true god-level creatures, she herself is not afraid, but there are also true god-level creatures in the Stygian Flower Realm that are very rebellious, even if they are god-level powerhouses at the level of the Inheritance Daozi, they can't compete, and once they encounter it, it is easy to fall and die.

With Danta's style, he will not send Danta's inheritance Dao into the Stygian Flower Realm, in case a inheritance Dao descends, the loss will be too heavy, and some materials can be compared.

After all, the price paid by Danta to cultivate a Inheritance Daoist is too great, and the loss of one is equivalent to the loss of countless resources and treasures!

And the inheritance Daozi of other forces and the son of the universe are also reluctant to enter the Stygian Flower Realm, because the Stygian Flower Realm is indeed too dangerous.

The reason why the Qinghan Fairy wants to enter the Stygian Flower Realm is because there is a strange flower in the Stygian Flower Realm, called the Flower of Eternity.

The Flower of Eternity has no effect of enhancing cultivation, only the effect of rejuvenation.

For women, the Flower of Eternity is a priceless treasure that can immortalize their faces for hundreds of millions of years, even after death, their faces and bodies will not grow old and immortal for many years.

The Qinghan Fairy longs for the Flower of Eternity very much, but unfortunately this flower is only found in the Flower Realm of the Underworld, and it cannot be brought out, because the Flower of Eternity can only be effective if it is taken within one minute of flowering and picking.

Someone tried to bring out the immature Flower of Eternity, but once the Flower of Eternity left the place where it was born, it immediately withered.

Because of this, the Flower of Eternity cannot be planted in the outside world.

Therefore, if the Qinghan Fairy wants to obtain the Flower of Eternity, he must enter the Immortal Flower Realm.

According to the news, the Flower of Eternity is about to bloom somewhere in the Stygian Flower Realm, and this is an opportunity, and if she misses it, she doesn't know how long she will have to wait.

Besides, it was impossible for her to stay at the god level all the time, once she hit the true god level, she would not be able to enter the Stygian Flower Realm.

"No matter, anyway, my father allowed me to enter the Stygian Flower Realm, this is the only opportunity, I can't miss it!"

Thinking of this, the Qinghan Fairy smiled slightly.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian was resting in a certain tower of the Dan Tower, and suddenly a master of the Dan Tower came to visit Ye Tian.

Inside the tower.

A master who looked like a young man looked at Ye Tian with a smile on his face, and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, it's a pleasure to meet you, I am one of the high-level leaders of the Dan Tower, you can call me the Yundan Master!"

"I've seen the Yundan Juggernaut!"

Ye Tian said politely.

After Lord Yundan sat down, he went straight to the topic: "Your Highness Wanfa, this time, I have something to ask you to help with?"

"What's the matter, Lord Yundan, please say. "

Ye Tiandao.

Yun Dan Juggernaut was embarrassed for a moment, and said: "My third daughter is called Qing Han, and she has a good talent, but it's a pity that I spoil her too much, and she has hardly suffered too much......

Ye Tian saw that Yun Dan Juggernaut kept introducing her daughter, so he hurriedly stopped: "Yun Dan Juggernaut, let's talk about things okay?"

"Okay!" Lord Yundan nodded and said, "My daughter is also preparing to enter the Stygian Flower Realm this time, and I am worried about her safety, so I hope His Highness Wanfa can take more care of my daughter in the Stygian Flower Realm." "

"What's in it for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

He didn't dare to do anything good.

Others will please a master, but he really won't take a master seriously.

Yun Dan dominated: "Your Highness Wanfa, I know that you want the Immortal Golden Pill, I can guarantee that No matter how many materials Your Highness Wanfa collects this time, whether you can obtain the Immortal Golden Pill or not, I will personally give His Highness Wanfa an Immortal Golden Pill and a personal promise from me." "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Obtaining one more immortal golden pill, such a good thing, why wouldn't he be happy.

Immortal Golden Pill, he will not be too much, because an Immortal Golden Pill may not be enough, and the more the better, it is naturally good.

"Thank you!"

Yun Dan Juggernaut said gratefully.

He had long known that Ye Tian would definitely agree, but he didn't expect to let Ye Tian agree only by paying such a price.

If Ye Tian didn't agree, he could only keep increasing his chips.

Time flies, nearly a month has passed, and Danta is ready to send someone into the Stygian Flower Realm.

this day.

In a certain square in Danta, Ye Tian came here early.

Distance.

On top of a stone tower, the Yundan Juggernaut and the Qinghan Fairy stood together.

"Father, you shouldn't have repented, right?"

The Qinghan Fairy looked at her father nervously and asked.

"Of course not!" Yun Dan dominated, "I allow you to enter the Stygian Flower Realm, naturally I will not regret it." This time, I just came to tell you that after entering the Stygian Flower Realm, I have already told him to protect you in the Stygian Flower Realm. "

"His Highness Wanfa, who is it?"

Qinghan Fairy asked.

"A highness of His Royal Highness of the Human Race, whose strength far surpasses that of our Danta Daozi, if he is there, you should not be in danger in the Stygian Flower Realm. Yun Dan Juggernaut said.

"Is this Wanfa His Highness really that powerful?"

The Qinghan Fairy asked suspiciously.

"Of course it's so powerful, remember one thing, don't be rude to His Highness Wanfa, his status is very noble, not even lower than mine, do you understand?"

Yun Dan Juggernaut admonished.

"Father, I know, I will definitely stay by His Highness Wanfa's side honestly!"

The Qinghan Fairy assured.

In fact, she didn't care about His Highness Wanfa in her heart, thinking that His Highness Wanfa must be the heir of a certain big man, and what combat power surpassed the Danta Inheritance Daozi, it was estimated that it was also boasted.

Of course.

She did not dare to contradict her father, lest he change his mind.

Anyway, once she enters the Stygian Flower Realm, no one can control her.

Moreover, this time when she entered the Stygian Flower Realm, her god-level escort team would also follow in, and with her own strength, as long as she was careful, she would not necessarily encounter danger.

"Father, I'm going!"

The Qinghan Fairy flew towards the square, and behind her, more than a dozen god-level guards flew over.

These dozen or so god-level guards are not weak, they were all god-level achievements of the Eight or Nine Star Peerless Heavenly Pride, and their strength is second only to some weaker inheritance Daozi, but her father spent a lot of money to find her guards.

This time, she brought them all.

on the square.

As soon as the Qinghan Fairy came to the square, Ye Tian walked over.

"You're the Qinghan Fairy, aren't you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Fairy Qinghan looked at Ye Tian, "What kind of Ten Thousand Fa Highness are you?"

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Your Highness Wanfa, in fact, I don't really need your protection, but my father has to ask you to protect me, and I can't help it. After entering the Stygian Flower Realm, I have my mission, and we can not interfere with each other, how about it?"

The Qinghan Fairy proposed.

"I entered the Stygian Flower Realm to collect red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves, isn't the Qinghan Fairy collecting red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves?" Ye Tian asked.

"No, I'm trying to collect the Flower of Eternity, so we don't think we'll be able to stop by. "

Qinghan Fairy said.

"Then let's do it, I can accompany the Qinghan Fairy and go to pick the Eternal Flower first, and then go and collect the Rosewood Flower and the Golden Bone Leaves, how about it?" Ye Tian proposed.

Seeing Ye Tian's attitude, Fairy Qinghan knew that it was not so easy for her to let Ye Tian give up following her, in case she annoyed Ye Tian, Ye Tian immediately informed her father, it would be bad.

So, she said, "Your Highness Wanfa, then let's do this first!"

As time passed, a huge battleship flew over, and the god-level people present entered the battleship one by one, leaving the Danta and heading to the place where the Stygian Flower Realm was located.

Three days later, the battleship arrived at a strange starry sky.

Immediately.

A god-class flew out of the battleship.

Ye Tian glanced around, knowing that there were about tens of thousands of god-level people who entered the Stygian Flower Realm this time, but he didn't know how many god-level they could come out in the end.

Among these god levels, most of them are god levels of external forces, acting as cannon fodder, but once they come out with red sandalwood and golden bone leaves from the Stygian Flower Realm, it will be tantamount to making a fortune.

Bang!!!

The Void cracked, and a Void Passage appeared.

This passage led to the Stygian Flower Realm, and a god-level person poured into the Stygian Flower Realm, and Ye Tian, Qinghan Fairy and others also flew into the Stygian Flower Realm.

......

Stygian Flower Realm.

On top of a swamp, a group of god-level people emerged one by one.

Then, these god-level flew to all parts of the Stygian Flower Realm.

In the Stygian Flower Realm, there are many places where rosewood flowers and golden bone trees grow, so these gods will not go to the same place.

The Qinghan Fairy wanted to leave as soon as possible, but Ye Tian stood beside her and said, "Qinghan Fairy, let's go." "

"Good!"

The Qinghan Fairy nodded helplessly.

Whew!!!

The group flew in a certain direction.

Along the way, the Qinghan Fairy looked around very vigilantly, although she was willful, but she was not stupid, she knew that the Stygian Flower Realm was very dangerous, so she was very vigilant, lest a terrifying creature come out to attack.

On the contrary, Ye Tian was very calm, always with a faint smile on his face.

Not long after flying, Ye Tian's smile disappeared, and he said lightly: "Be careful, there is a group of creatures ahead!"

"Rush over, don't delay time, this route is the closest, I have to make sure to get to the place where the Flower of Eternity is in the first place, so I have to go quickly. Qinghan Fairy said.

"Yes, Third Miss!"

More than a dozen god-level guards answered, and immediately rushed over.

Rumble!!!

Huge toads jumped out of the swamp, there were about a hundred of them, most of them were god-level cultivators, and there were more than a dozen true god-level toads.

The talent of these toads is average, so their combat effectiveness is very ordinary, and more than a dozen god-level guards used to be eight or nine star Tianjiao, and their combat power was very terrifying, so they killed this group of toads one by one very easily.

When the corpse of the toad was floating on the swamp, the Qinghan Fairy looked at Ye Tian triumphantly and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, the strength of this group of guards under me is okay, right?"

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"So, I don't need your help at all!" said the Qinghan Fairy.

"However, there's a big guy down there, I wonder if your guards can handle it?"

Ye Tian suddenly smiled and said.
